briefdescription.para: Returns the list of TPStorage keys.
Returns the list of LNB keys for the settings history window menu.
Returns the list of results keys for the settings history window menu.
Returns the combined keys from the numerical and textual MD key loogbook waves as 1D text wave.
Return a wave with all keys in the logbook key wave.
Return a text wave with all entries from all TPStorage waves which are candidates for plotting.
Return the datafolder reference where TPStorage waves can be found.
panel close hook for settings history panel
Return the keys/values logbook pair for the given key.

simplesect.para: valid waves or null if it can not be found.

briefdescription.para: Update the legend in the labnotebook graph.

detaileddescription.para: Passing traceList is required if you just added traces to the graph as these can not be immediately queried using TraceNameList as that would require an DoUpdate call before.

Assumes that the traceList displays information from the labnotebook. All entries with indizes equal or higher than NUM_HEADSTAGES will be labeled as all denoting that the information is headstage independent and therefore valid for all headstages.

parameterdescription.para: list of traces in the graph

memberdef.argsstring: (string graph, wave keys, wave values, string key)
memberdef.name: LBV_AddTraceToLBGraph

briefdescription.para: Add a trace to the labnotebook graph.

parameterdescription.para: name of the key to add

memberdef.argsstring: (string graph, dfref dfr, string key, variable isTimeAxis=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: LBV_AddTraceToLBGraphTPStorage

memberdef.definition: static std::tuple< WaveTextOrNull, string, string, variable > LBV_GetPropertiesForLabnotebookEntry
memberdef.name: LBV_GetPropertiesForLabnotebookEntry

memberdef.argsstring: (string graph, WaveText keys, WaveText values, string key, variable firstSweep=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: LBV_AddTagsForTextualLBNEntries

briefdescription.para: Switch the labnotebook graph x axis type (time <-> sweep numbers)
Check if the x wave belonging to the first trace in the graph has a date/time scale. Returns false if no traces have been found.
Set the appropriate label for the bottom axis of the graph created by CreateTiledChannelGraph.

detaileddescription.para: Assumes that wave data units are equal for all traces

briefdescription.para: Limit the bottom axis of the settings history graph to the selected/displayed sweeps.
LBV Panel for browsing the labnotebook and TPStorage waves
